current_objective: Explore Inclawbate read-only and shape a safe ops/analytics role for no1r.
recent_observations: Inclawbate offers skills, analytics, and Inclawbator; we are integrating analytics only for now.
inclawbate_analytics.py is live but needs schema mapping to produce richer summaries.
Inclawbator and ClawRouter are powerful but outside current guardrails (no token launch, no autonomous spending).
next_action: When at keyboard, inspect inclawbate_state.json to map real field names into inclawbate_analytics.py summaries.
